description: React task management app with drag-and-drop, focus timer, and today view
notes: Jira integration is live with full OAuth, API proxy, webhook events, and JiraView matching the Linear pattern. Overview now has a Standup button that generates a plain-language activity summary as a doc artifact. Recent Progress feed supports right-click dismiss and cleaned up timestamps. Next: re-enable Linear webhook HMAC verification, submit Figma app for review, and build Insights view.
